questions.text: What is QR decomposition used for?
options: Solving least-squares problems and linear systems
questions.correctAnswer: Solving least-squares problems and linear systems

questions.text: In QR decomposition, what type of matrix is Q?
What does Cholesky decomposition require about the input matrix?
options: It must be square and symmetric
It must be square, symmetric, and positive-definite
questions.correctAnswer: It must be square, symmetric, and positive-definite

questions.text: Compare QR and Cholesky decompositions. When would you use each, and what are their respective advantages?

options: Breaking down a 3D or higher-dimensional array into simpler components
questions.correctAnswer: Breaking down a 3D or higher-dimensional array into simpler components

questions.text: What is the null space of a matrix?
options: The set of vectors that map to zero when multiplied by the matrix
The set of zero elements in the matrix
The space perpendicular to the column space
questions.correctAnswer: The set of vectors that map to zero when multiplied by the matrix
